author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #11 is confirmed! Join us this Wednesday at 2200 UTC! 

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel  

This week's main topic: Low Risk Zone: How do you envision the economy in the safe zones? Will the biggest metaverse enterprises establish themselves or look forward to regions outside of the regional and faction DAO taxation rules? What kind of enterprise will be native to the low-risk zones? Will the low-risk zone be able to supply its populations with the necessary resources for their upkeeps, or will the importation of goods plays a huge role in their daily needs? How will the Polis and political game affects the heart of safe zones? Will the safe zones work as a place for politics as Washington?  
 
See you all on Wednesday at 22:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/968604773521690634
